questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Never'?

choices.text: Never I have seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never I seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never did I see such a beautiful sunset.

questions.explanation: После 'Never' требуется инверсия: вспомогательный глагол 'have' перед подлежащим.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Under no circumstances'?

choices.text: Under no circumstances we should share this.
Under no circumstances should we share this.
Under no circumstances we should not share this.
Under no circumstances should not we share this.

questions.explanation: После 'Under no circumstances' инверсия: вспомогательный глагол 'should' перед подлежащим.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Only then'?

choices.text: Only then the audience understood the twist.
Only then did the audience understand the twist.
Only then the audience did understand the twist.
Only then understood the audience the twist.

questions.explanation: После 'Only then' в прошедшем времени используется 'did' перед подлежащим.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Hardly'?

choices.text: Hardly I had arrived when the phone rang.
Hardly had I arrived when the phone rang.
Hardly I arrived when the phone rang.
Hardly had arrived I when the phone rang.

questions.explanation: После 'Hardly' используется Past Perfect в инверсии: had + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Not only'?

choices.text: Not only she won the race.
Not only did she win the race.
Not only she did win the race.
Not only won she the race.

questions.explanation: После 'Not only' требуется инверсия: did + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Rarely'?

choices.text: Rarely I see such a beautiful sunset.
Rarely do I see such a beautiful sunset.
Rarely I seen such a beautiful sunset.
Rarely does I see such a beautiful sunset.

questions.explanation: После наречий, выражающих редкость (Rarely), требуется инверсия: do + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Seldom'?

choices.text: Seldom we see such a beautiful sunset.
Seldom do we see such a beautiful sunset.
Seldom we seen such a beautiful sunset.
Seldom does we see such a beautiful sunset.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'No sooner'?

choices.text: No sooner I left than it started raining.
No sooner had I left than it started raining.
No sooner I had left than it started raining.
No sooner left I than it started raining.

questions.explanation: После 'No sooner' используется Past Perfect в инверсии: had + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию после 'Under no circumstances' в вопросе?

choices.text: Under no circumstances should you share this?
Under no circumstances you should share this?
Under no circumstances should share you this?
Under no circumstances you share should this?

questions.explanation: В вопросах после 'Under no circumstances' инверсия сохраняется: should + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку в инверсии после 'Never'?

choices.text: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never I have seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never have I felt such relief.
Never have I been so happy.

questions.explanation: После 'Never' инверсия требует вспомогательного глагола перед подлежащим, поэтому вариант b неправильный.
